category_title: Students focused on immediate, small-scale social action (micro-mobilization)
scenario_title: Fixation on material school dilapidation over subterranean hegemony
minimal_context: The student is proposing a social justice project based on observations of Montañita High School's physical environment.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: For your social justice project, what recommendations for action are you proposing based on your observations of Montañita High School?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: We want to propose a project to remediate the dilapidated physical condition of the school itself. We observed that the bathrooms have no stall doors or soap in the dispensers.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What else did you include in your observations?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: There is un-remediated graffiti everywhere. Also, we were shocked to learn that in some schools, the vending machines are not in cages!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Why do you want to make these specific issues the focus of your project?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Because this dilapidation lowers morale and makes the school seem downgraded. We just need to fix these material elements so these conditions don't make Montañita look bad to outsiders.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: For your social justice project, what recommendations for action are you proposing based on your observations of Montañita High School?

STUDENT: We want to propose a project to remediate the dilapidated physical condition of the school itself. We observed that the bathrooms have no stall doors or soap in the dispensers.

TUTOR: What else did you include in your observations?

STUDENT: There is un-remediated graffiti everywhere. Also, we were shocked to learn that in some schools, the vending machines are not in cages!

TUTOR: Why do you want to make these specific issues the focus of your project?

STUDENT: Because this dilapidation lowers morale and makes the school seem downgraded. We just need to fix these material elements so these conditions don't make Montañita look bad to outsiders.
